Tools To 6-Figures (Plug & Play)
Getting you locked & loaded:
This sheet includes the relevant links as well as some instructional videos on how to
set up these tools so you’re locked & loaded to get clients.
I’ve always tried to give you a free & paid option except for certain scenarios where
it’s an absolute no brainer to go with a specific software.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Website/Funnel Builder: Clickfunnels
Fee: $97/pm after a full 14-day free trial available through exclusively this link
https://growyouragency.com/clickfunnelstrail
Severity: 10/10
When To Use: Sign up NOW! This tool is a game changer because I literally get to
give you half of my agency for you to COPY + PASTE using the funnel links. If you
want to get started with a 14-day free trial click HERE.
How To Use The Software: Coming in later modules.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Invoicing: Simple Invoices
Alternative: Use Stripe’s native invoicing system (free) as you’ll already be using this
service to take payments.
Fee: $10/pm after a 14-day free trial available HERE
Severity: 6/10
When To Use: When you’re about to sign your first client, sign up to the 14-day free
trail and then from there you can just continue to keep paying.
How To Use The Software: Coming in later modules.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 6 --

Tools To 6-Figures (Plug & Play)
Communication: Slack
Alternative: Use Slack’s free version for as long as you can.
Fee: $6/pm per active user - Click HERE to get the paid plan.
Severity: 5/10
When To Use: When you got a lot of clients and you want to avoid confusion when
they end up in the default channel ‘general’ plus you need an entire backlog of all
messages, so you get the paid version.
How To Use The Software: Create workspace for all your clients and team. Create
separate channels that are specific to each client and when you invite the client to
your Slack workspace, make sure you only invite them to that specific channel
(Single-channel user).
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Contracts: HelloSign
Alternative: Manually send clients the contract, they sign it and scan, then you sign
it and scan. Absolute nightmare.
Fee: $15/pm and is available HERE
Severity: 8/10
When To Use: When you’re about to sign your first client, sign up to this service
ASAP and make sure you throw it into your on-boarding module (more on this later).
How To Use The Software: Coming in later modules.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 6 --

Tools To 6-Figures (Plug & Play)
Screen Recording/Sharing: Loom
Alternative: Use Loom’s free version.
Fee: $10/pm and is available HERE
Severity: 7/10
When To Use: Once you get near 100 recorder videos so you want a backlog of them
all stored. Loom pro allows you the app that lets you record 4k & HD screen capture.
It also stores more than 100 videos which is all you get with the basic version.
How To Use The Software: Self explanatory.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Video Hosting: Vimeo
Fee: Free (500mb per week limit) - Click HERE
When To Use: Sign up once you shoot the website scheduling page video (coming
soon) and you’ll also need it when you film the on-boarding modules.
How To Use The Software: Self explanatory.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Scheduling Software: Acuity Scheduling
Alternative: Use Google Calendar. With this option you can’t allow someone to just
book in a time automatically from your available slots. You’ll have to actually ask
them - ‘What time works for you?’ And ask them what email is best for the Cal invite.
When you’re face to face or on the phone with someone, this is the best option but
it’s so important to have an automatic scheduler where someone can just book in a
Discovery Call
Fee: $15/pm and is available HERE
Severity: 8/10
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 6 --

Tools To 6-Figures (Plug & Play)
When To Use: Once you start reaching out to clients because you’ll need a
scheduling link for them to book in a time to speak with you
Acuity scheduling is my favourite scheduling software. Better than Calendly &
ScheduleOnce in my opinion. Their survey/form section is brilliant and so is their
interface too.
How To Use The Software: IMPORTANT! There are some settings you need to make
sure are in place before you start using this software - Click HERE to watch it.
Questions For Discovery Calls:
1. What’s your website (Type ‘N/A’ if you don’t have one) {Textbox small}
2. Your business social media links (As many as possible, hit shift for extra space)
{Textbox medium}
3. What’s your currently monthly revenue? {Dropdown list}
$10k-$25k per month
$25k-$50k per month
$50k-$100k per month
$100k-$250k per month
$250k-$500k per month
More than $500,000+ per month
4. What’s your desired monthly revenue in 12 months? {Textbox small}
5. If you're accepted how soon can you get started? {Textbox small}
6. Have you ever worked with an agency before? (If yes, what was your
experience with them?) {Textbox medium}
7. What sets you apart from other applicants wanting to work with us? {Textbox
medium}
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

Tools To 6-Figures (Plug & Play)
Full Suite: Google Suite
Fee: $6/pm for basic plan (All you need) - Click HERE
Severity: 10/10
When To Use: DO NOT sign up now, wait until the next module where you would’ve
already bought a domain and that makes it easier to sign up to GSuite once you
have your registered domain, business email, etc
How To Use The Software: Coming in later modules.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Microphone: Blue Yeti
Alternative: The computer you’re using right now will have a native microphone on
it and you can continue to use this if you’re on a tighter budget. The audio that
comes from it really won’t be great though.
Fee: $100 one time
Severity: 8/10
When To Use: I recommend that you buy this microphone as soon as you can. I’ve
tried $200 and $300 USB microphones before and this is still hands down my
favourite microphone. You’re guaranteed to get more responses from clients & have
a better experience cold calling from your computer (more on this later) if you just
use a higher quality of microphone. This is a no brainer really.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Online/Remote Calls: Zoom
Alternative: Just use the free version - Hands down the best way to have online
meetings with clients. Unique zoom meeting ID allows you to put the link to join the
call right in the confirmation email of Zoom. The only issue with the free version is
that it’s got a 40-minute max meeting length when there are more than 2 people in
the meeting.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 6 --

Tools To 6-Figures (Plug & Play)
Fee: $15/pm and is available HERE
Severity: 8/10
When To Use: If you have the money and want to save embarrassment from
meeting ending after 40min if they bring a business partner.
With Zoom pro literally the only notable difference is that you can have group
meetings longer than 40 minutes. This is super important if they bring a business
partner or you have your strategy session once they become a client with a
contractor or their business partner present.
How To Use The Software: Self explanatory.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
